item.name: High House Supper Set
item.description:
An extravagant multiple-course meal enjoyed by the nobility of Ishgard on saint feast days and other ceremonious occasions.

※Cannot be retrieved once used.
※Can be used up to 10 times.

Meal benefits when used:
Determination Bonus: +4% (Max 28)
VIT Bonus: +4% (Max 27)
Gear Durability Bonus: +3
EXP Bonus: +3%
Duration: 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
